<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Description; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\Type; /** * Reflection class for a {@}template-extends tag in a Docblock. */ final class TemplateExtends extends Extends_ { public function __construct(Type $type, ?Description $description = null) { parent::__construct($type, $description); $this->name = 'template-extends'; } }
